name: compliance loop cites pr-corpus when control coverage evidence comes from a learned PR pattern
command:
mkdir -p pr-corpus compliance && printf 'controls:
  - control_id: CC8.1
    satisfied_by: [pr-corpus:no-eval]
' > compliance/coverage.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/cross-loop-cite.sh" --coverage compliance/coverage.yaml --emit citations 2>out.txt && grep -q 'control=CC8.1' out.txt && grep -q 'evidence=pr-corpus:no-eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
